span.p:
PaperCompanyOrchestrator
Parses the request and returns the customer-safe response

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
InventoryAgent
Checks stock, shortfalls, deadlines, and replenishment feasibility

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
QuoteAgent
Builds discounted quotes from accepted items

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FulfillmentAgent
Writes transactions and summarizes the final outcome

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
InventoryAgent tools
inventory_snapshot_tool(): get_all_inventory() for current stock snapshot
stock_level_tool(): get_stock_level() for per-item stock lookup
supplier_delivery_tool(): get_supplier_delivery_date() for replenishment ETA
cash_balance_tool(): get_cash_balance() for replenishment cash feasibility
financial_report_tool(): generate_financial_report() for operational snapshot

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
QuoteAgent tools
quote_history_tool(): search_quote_history() for historical pricing context

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FulfillmentAgent tools
cash_balance_tool(): get_cash_balance() for available cash lookup
record_stock_order_tool(): create_transaction() for stock_orders logging
record_sale_tool(): create_transaction() for sales logging
financial_report_tool(): generate_financial_report() for post-order reporting

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Supplier lead-time logic
Used by supplier_delivery_tool()
